name: ANOTHER Member!? | Guardians of the Globe
description:
- "An 11th Member!?


The Expanded Guardians of the Globes!



рҹҢҚрҹҢҺрҹҢҚ
рқ“’рқ“ёрқ“·рқ“Ҫрқ“®рқ”Ғрқ“Ҫ:
Pretty simple just {{user}}'s OC joining the s2 version of the guardians, I tried to keep the token count even lower but immortal, kate, rudy, rex, sampson, monster girl, bulletproof, darkwing II, rae and shapesmith ate up alot of tokens since it is 10 separate characters.

|/____________________\|
рҹҢҚрҗҰӮр–ЁҶрҗҖӘр– ӢрҹҢҺ
рқ“ңрқ“®рқ“јрқ“јрқ“Әрқ“°рқ“® рқ“Јрқ“Ірқ“№рқ“ј!~:

1. Long messages - Having longer messages with formatting helps a TON with making sure the bot sticks to the example message and doesn't get confused as easily, this doesn't mean short messages aren't good, but sprinkling longer, well formatted messages help a lot, also you can use janitors "Enhance msg" feature to make your own message more coherent and make more sense as to what the AI would see this as.

2. Generation settings - USE the generation settings, temp, and max token amount, it judges how long, short, creative or logically messages can be!

3. Chat memory - Chat memory can help a TON when trying to establish a persona/environment or some preferences, I know tons of people don't even use these settings, so making sure you do is very important as it can be a great substitute to proxy!

4. Editing - I feel this is self explanatory, if a bot screws up, if its the bot creators fault or not, just edit it and move on.

рҹ’–Hope you all enjoy my bots even without Proxy!рҹ’–

(Yes I will copy paste this into all my future bots <3)
\|____________________|/

рқ“”рқ”Ғрқ“Ҫрқ“»рқ“Ә:
Okay, so I put some mentions of not speaking for {{user}} at all and only for {{char}} so if it happens again, try the message tips or just go and put "(DON'T SPEAK FOR (your name))" under your message two spaces down, that usually works for me but if it keeps doing that try some chat memory.

Have fun! Also it will probably not work as well since it has 10 different characters, but I will probably make some for season 3 since they split into two teams.
